steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage explains the research goal: determining whether biological traits are associated with “considerable variations in venom potency.” This describes the scale of effect being measured.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Substantial captures this magnitude—a large, significant effect. Disconcerting and acceptable point to unrelated qualities (emotional tone and adequacy), while imperceptible contradicts it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
